Headline: #152 Addison Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Addison/Western
ShortDescription: Eastbound 152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted via Addison, Western, Roscoe, Damen and Addison: due to, street blockage near Addison/Western.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect trip?

 

Eastbound #152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted via Addison, Western, Roscoe, Damen, Addison and over regular route: due to, street blockage near Addison/Western.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
